title: Raw hex 0x0095 instead of TPM_RC_SIZE constant in do_transact
description: In wolftpm-tss/src/connection.rs line 38, the condition 'if rc == 0x0095' checks for TPM_RC_SIZE using a raw hex literal. The constant wolftpm_sys::TPM_RC_T_TPM_RC_SIZE (or equivalent) exists in the sys crate and is used by name elsewhere. Using the constant instead of the raw hex would make the intent self-documenting without needing the inline comment, and would remain correct if the upstream constant ever changes. A reader currently needs to verify the comment against the TPM spec manually.
